# Real HTML Fixture Sources

These fixtures are frozen excerpts from live brand pages. Each file keeps the original page's key head metadata, canonical URL, structured-data scripts, and `main` or `article` DOM so parser and rule regressions can be tested against realistic markup without depending on the live site at test time.

Fetched on: `2026-06-17` and `2026-06-22`

Fixtures:

- `real_shopify_plus_excerpt.html`
  - Source: `https://www.shopify.com/plus`
  - Notes: Shopify enterprise / landing page excerpt
- `real_ahrefs_keyword_research_excerpt.html`
  - Source: `https://ahrefs.com/seo/keyword-research`
  - Notes: Ahrefs keyword research guide excerpt
- `real_ahrefs_seo_vs_sem_excerpt.html`
  - Source: `https://ahrefs.com/blog/seo-vs-sem/`
  - Notes: Ahrefs comparison-style blog article excerpt
- `real_moz_beginners_guide_excerpt.html`
  - Source: `https://moz.com/beginners-guide-to-seo`
  - Notes: Moz SEO guide excerpt; current frozen excerpt reproduces a missing-H1 structure edge case
- `real_cnn_homepage_excerpt.html`
  - Source: `https://www.cnn.com/`
  - Notes: CNN news homepage excerpt
- `real_apple_iphone_excerpt.html`
  - Source: `https://www.apple.com/iphone/`
  - Notes: Apple consumer electronics product/category page excerpt
- `real_stripe_pricing_excerpt.html`
  - Source: `https://stripe.com/pricing`
  - Notes: Stripe SaaS/payments pricing page excerpt
- `real_wikipedia_ai_excerpt.html`
  - Source: `https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Artificial_intelligence`
  - Notes: Wikipedia encyclopedia article excerpt
- `real_cdc_diabetes_excerpt.html`
  - Source: `https://www.cdc.gov/diabetes/about/index.html`
  - Notes: CDC public health informational article excerpt
